ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the state's education department */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the state's education department website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_spending" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the spending data */,
  "spend_per_student" REAL /* Spending per student */,
  "total_spending" REAL /* Total spending on education */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "spending_category" TEXT /* Category of spending */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_spending_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_spending_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_student_ratio" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ratio record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ratio data */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Teacher-student ratio */,
  "teacher_count" INTEGER /* Number of teachers */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students */,
  "ratio_type" TEXT /* Type of ratio */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or explanations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_student_ratio_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary data */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average teacher salary */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum teacher salary */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum teacher salary */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided to teachers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_salaries_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "prcnt_take" INTEGER /* Percentage of students taking the SAT */,
  "satv_score" INTEGER /* Average SAT Verbal score */,
  "satm_score" INTEGER /* Average SAT Math score */,
  "satt_score" INTEGER /* Average SAT Total score */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area of the performance metrics */,
  "performance_level" TEXT /* Level of performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding */,
  "allocation" TEXT /* Information about how funds are allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, educator) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_table" TEXT /* Table name of the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific data record accessed */,
  "data_table_column" TEXT /* Name of the column accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
